name: Wayside Country Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the excess fat from 1 pound pork shoulder.
2. Grind the pork through the fine blade of a meat grinder.
3. Combine the ground pork with 1 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, 1 teaspoon thyme, 1/4 teaspoon dry mustard, and 1 teaspoon crumbled sage.
4. Shape into patties and pan fry or broil slowly for about 15 minutes, or until well browned on both sides. Makes about 1 pound.
